query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN odooDocumentId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked, SUM(CASE WHEN odooDocumentId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unlinked FROM company_documents;
